text: South Australia New Women's and Children's Hospital (Relocation of SA Police Facilities) Amendment Bill 2023 A Bill For An Act to amend the New Women's and Children's Hospital Act 2022. Contents Part 1—Preliminary 1 Short title Part 2—Amendment of New Women's and Children's Hospital Act 2022 2 Repeal of section 10 The Parliament of South Australia enacts as follows: Part 1—Preliminary 1—Short title This Act may be cited as the New Women's and Children's Hospital (Relocation of SA Police Facilities) Amendment Act 2023. Part 2—Amendment of New Women's and Children's Hospital Act 2022 2—Repeal of section 10 Section 10—delete the section
citation: New Women's and Children's Hospital (Relocation of SA Police Facilities) Amendment Bill 2023 (SA)
